text:
The Jump Characters Store (ジャンプキャラクターズストア) is an official shopping site of Shueisha that sells a wide variety of original merchandise and anime goods from works serialized in the Weekly Shonen Jump, similar to JUMP SHOP. The two sites are operated by different companies, but often collaborate for events. Although both stores can share the same Jump merchandise listings, both stores also have their own exclusive or limited merchandise. Unlike JUMP SHOP, Jump Characters Store does not have a physical store. Jump Characters Store is abbreviated as JCS.

Collections With Their Own Page

The following is a list of links for merchandise collections that have their own designated articles, and whose products are not listed on this page.
Weekly Shōnen Jump Merchandise (Non-limited merchandise sold at JUMP SHOP and/or Jump Characters Store)
